title: Elio's Animal Sounds
synopsis: Baby Elio explores his backyard and discovers different animals, learning their sounds while feeling happy and excited. Each animal makes a special sound that Elio tries to copy, creating a joyful pattern of discovery and mimicry.

pages.text: Elio hears something. What is it?

illustration.description: A cheerful toddler with warm brown skin and curly black hair wearing a bright yellow shirt stands in a sunny backyard. His dark eyes are wide with curiosity as he cups his hand to his ear, listening. The background shows a simple garden with green grass and a few colorful flowers in soft pastels.
illustration.alt: Elio listening curiously in his backyard

pages.text: A bird says CHIRP CHIRP! Elio says CHIRP CHIRP too!

illustration.description: Elio looks up with delight at a small blue bird perched on a low tree branch. His mouth is open as if chirping, with a big smile on his face. The bird is rendered in soft blue watercolors with friendly round eyes. Gentle green leaves frame the scene with warm sunlight filtering through.
illustration.alt: Elio chirping with a blue bird

pages.text: A cat says MEOW MEOW! Elio says MEOW MEOW too!

illustration.description: A fluffy orange tabby cat sits on soft grass looking up at Elio with bright green eyes. Elio crouches down with his hands on his knees, mouth open in a meowing expression, giggling. The cat's tail curls up happily. The scene uses warm orange and cream colors with touches of green grass.
illustration.alt: Elio meowing with an orange cat

pages.text: A dog says WOOF WOOF! Elio says WOOF WOOF too!

illustration.description: A friendly golden retriever with a wagging tail sits facing Elio, who has his arms outstretched and mouth open barking playfully. Both look joyful and energetic. The dog's tongue hangs out happily. The background shows a simple fence and blue sky with puffy white clouds.
illustration.alt: Elio barking with a golden dog

pages.text: A cow says MOO MOO! Elio says MOO MOO too!

illustration.description: A gentle black and white spotted cow peers over a low wooden fence with kind brown eyes. Elio stands on tiptoes reaching toward the cow, his mouth open in a big MOO. The cow's pink nose is prominent and friendly. Soft green meadow and blue sky create a peaceful pastoral scene.
illustration.alt: Elio mooing with a spotted cow

pages.text: A duck says QUACK QUACK! Elio says QUACK QUACK too!

illustration.description: A yellow duck waddles near a small blue pond while Elio sits cross-legged on the grass nearby, hands flapping like wings and mouth open quacking. The duck has a bright orange beak and webbed feet. Water lilies float on the pond's surface in soft pink and white tones.
illustration.alt: Elio quacking with a yellow duck

pages.text: A pig says OINK OINK! Elio says OINK OINK too!

illustration.description: A round pink pig with a curly tail rolls happily in soft brown mud while Elio kneels beside the pen, giggling and making pig sounds with his hands cupped around his mouth. The pig has a sweet snout and small bright eyes. A simple wooden fence surrounds them.
illustration.alt: Elio oinking with a pink pig

pages.text: So many animal friends! Elio feels happy!

illustration.description: Elio sits in the center of the yard with his arms raised in joy, surrounded by all his new animal friends - the bird, cat, dog, cow, duck, and pig - arranged in a gentle circle around him. Everyone looks content and happy. The scene glows with warm golden afternoon light and soft pastel colors throughout.
illustration.alt: Elio surrounded by all his happy animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the bird make?
questions.explanation: The bird says CHIRP CHIRP and Elio copies the sound!

questions.question: What color is the duck?
questions.explanation: The duck is yellow and says QUACK QUACK!

questions.question: How does Elio feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Elio feels happy with all his animal friends!

pages.sentence: A bird says ___ CHIRP! Elio says CHIRP CHIRP too!
A ___ says MOO MOO! Elio says MOO MOO too!
